message.starwrought.aurora_begins: An aurora kindles above. Starfall is near!
message.starwrought.umbral_begins: The stars dim. An Umbral Night has begun.
message.starwrought.herald_summoned: The Herald of the Hollow Star awakens!
message.starwrought.wayband_unbound: Bind this Wayband to a Lumen Spire first.
message.starwrought.wayband_bound: Wayband bound to this Lumen Spire.
message.starwrought.wayband_lost: The bound Lumen Spire can no longer be found.
message.starwrought.forecast_distant: The constellations are distant in this realm.
message.starwrought.forecast_aurora: The aurora is the next celestial event.
message.starwrought.forecast_umbral: An Umbral Night approaches before the next aurora.
message.starwrought.ability_locked: Reach attunement level 5 to use this ability.
message.starwrought.codex_granted: A Codex Arcana forms around your first Star Shard.
handbook.starwrought.title: Codex Arcana
handbook.starwrought.subtitle: Starwrought Compendium
handbook.starwrought.locked: Locked — discover more of the stars.
handbook.starwrought.locked_body: This knowledge has not yet been unlocked.
advancement.starwrought.altar.title: Resonant Foundations
advancement.starwrought.attune.title: Written in the Stars
advancement.starwrought.attune.descripti: Use a chart at a Resonance Altar
advancement.starwrought.herald.title: At the Zenith
advancement.starwrought.herald.descripti: Defeat the Herald of the Hollow Star
handbook.starwrought.entry.getting_start: Find Star Shards in meteorites during aurora nights.
handbook.starwrought.entry.sky_events.bo: Auroras arrive about every four nights; Umbral Nights about every twelve.
handbook.starwrought.entry.star_shards.b: Meteorite cores and surrounding stone hold celestial material.
handbook.starwrought.entry.astrolabe.bod: Use it for a forecast. Held astrolabes seek nearby meteorite cores.
handbook.starwrought.entry.resonance_alt: Use a constellation chart on the altar to attune.
handbook.starwrought.entry.wolf.title: The Wolf
handbook.starwrought.entry.wolf.body: Night kills deepen Wolf attunement. Level 5 unlocks Pack Howl.
handbook.starwrought.entry.lyra.title: Lyra
handbook.starwrought.entry.lyra.body: Travel deepens Lyra attunement. Level 5 unlocks Comet Dash.
handbook.starwrought.entry.anvil.title: The Anvil
handbook.starwrought.entry.anvil.body: Forging deepens Anvil attunement and hastens the Star Forge.
handbook.starwrought.entry.star_forge.bo: Insert a Star Shard and iron. Aurora light doubles its pace.
handbook.starwrought.entry.lumen_network: Bind a Wayband to a Lumen Spire, then channel to return.
handbook.starwrought.entry.phase_flare.b: The first use marks a place; later uses swap it with your position.
Hollow Stalkers blink through darkness and leave Hollow Residue.
handbook.starwrought.entry.voidglass.bod: Voidglass is needed to wake the Hollow Beacon.
handbook.starwrought.entry.herald.title: The Herald
handbook.starwrought.entry.herald.body: Four Hollow Residue and Voidglass awaken a three-phase boss.
handbook.starwrought.entry.zenith.title: Zenith
handbook.starwrought.entry.zenith.body: The Herald's Zenith Core marks mastery of Starwrought.
